chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 2325 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 13-10-2025 None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation is received. Perusal of the prayer clause reflects that the Petitioner being a civil servant has challenged his transfer and posting order, which is one of the terms and conditions of service, therefore, the jurisdiction of this Court is barred under Article 212 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973, hence the instant Petition cannot be entertained under writ jurisdiction. Since no one is present on behalf of the Petitioner, the instant Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
